tools.name: renoun_analyze
tools.description: Deep structural analysis of a conversation. Detects loops, stuck states, breakthroughs, and convergence patterns across 17 channels without reading the content. Returns a health score (0-1), pattern classifications (8 types including CLOSED_LOOP, PATTERN_BREAK, CONVERGENCE, SURFACE_VARIATION), breakthrough moments, and actionable next steps.

tools.name: renoun_health_check
tools.description: Fast structural triage. Is this conversation stuck, healthy, or falling apart? Returns one score, one pattern, one summary. Sub-50ms.

tools.name: renoun_compare
tools.description: Structural A/B test between two conversations. Did the second session improve over the first? Which channels shifted? Did the pattern change from stuck to converging?

tools.name: renoun_pattern_query
tools.description: Query structural patterns across sessions over time. Save analysis results, filter by date/domain/pattern/health, compute DHS trends.

tools.name: renoun_steer
tools.description: Real-time inference steering. Monitor a live conversation and get actionable signals when the model should change strategy. Rolling window buffers with automatic threshold-based alerts.

tools.name: renoun_finance_analyze
tools.description: Structural analysis of financial OHLCV data using the 17-channel engine. Returns DHS, constellation patterns, stress levels, and exposure recommendations. Validated drawdown reduction on 31/31 datasets across 9 crypto assets and 5 timeframes.
